stemHtml: The ATC wishes to direct the flight crew to manually initiate a logon to the subsequent ATSU after a failed ATSU transfer attempt. What is the appropriate phraseology?

options.c: CPDLC WILL BE SHUTDOWN. DISCONNECT CPDLC. CONTINUE ON VOICE.
options.d: RESUME NORMAL CPDLC OPERATIONS. LOGON TO [facility designation].
